# NextMove Pilot feedback

This is the secondary channel for installation failures, CLI bugs, Skill
invocation failures, output-contract issues, and detailed technical feedback.
Non-technical users may copy `docs/pilot-feedback-template.md` into any channel.

## Usage path

- [ ] ChatGPT Agent
- [ ] Claude
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Python API

## Scenario

- [ ] Resume analysis
- [ ] Job matching
- [ ] Resume improvement
- [ ] Career planning

## Outcome

- [ ] Complete four-part report
- [ ] Structured failure
- [ ] Installation or invocation failure
- [ ] Output-format problem

## Privacy warning

Do not submit a full resume, job description, real name, phone number, email,
company confidential information, API key, token, password, credential, or raw
private Agent conversation. Use an anonymous summary or fictional reproduction
before adding free text below.

## Anonymous reproduction details

Describe the smallest privacy-safe or fictional reproduction. Include the
NextMove version and invocation path when known.


## Expected outcome


## Observed outcome
